creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Yaman from comment #6)

For what I've checked on .sh scripts is that all starts with #!/bin/sh which is correct and some of them call 'bash' to execute other things and because port build depends on bash, it should be in path.

I will remove this sed, recheck builds and if nothing strange shows up, I'll commit it.

After commit, if you find something wrong, then reopen this PR ASAP.

Cheers
